expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: donut-chart data label coverage distinguishes label visibility, density, and overlap-sensitive outcomes
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the focus and structures coverage into three axes: “Focus: donut-chart data label coverage that distinguishes **label visibility**, **label density**, and **overlap-sensitive outcomes**.” It further breaks coverage into sections “A. Label visibility”, “B. Label density”, and “C. Overlap-sensitive outcomes (collision handling & resolution)”, each with concrete coverage requirements and assertion types.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md is labeled “QA Plan Orchestrator — Phase 4a Deliverable (Advisory)” and declares “Primary phase under test: phase4a (phase contract)”. Content matches phase4a scope (coverage model, scenario matrix, oracle definitions, verification methods) and explicitly notes it is “a **phase4a** test design / coverage contract artifact (advisory), not execution results.”
